components: 3-6 metric cards with current value + delta % + sparkline trend; color coded by direction
when_to_use: Top of any analytics dashboard; first thing user sees on login; primary health indicators

components: Fixed left sidebar (240px) + collapsible to icon-only (64px) + main content area + optional right panel
when_to_use: Any product with 5+ navigation destinations; enterprise tools; admin panels; always prefer for desktop-primary products

components: Sortable columns + column visibility toggle + row checkbox + bulk action toolbar + pagination; sticky header
when_to_use: Displaying lists of entities (users; orders; transactions); requires bulk operations; more than 10 rows

components: Reverse-chronological event list + avatar/icon per entry + relative timestamps + load-more or infinite scroll
when_to_use: Surfacing recent system or team activity; audit logs; what-changed views where order matters more than aggregation

components: Left vertical tab navigation by category (Account; Security; Notifications; Billing) + content panel with save per section
when_to_use: Any product with 10+ settings; prevents overwhelming single long form; enables deep-linking to specific section

components: Label + description + toggle right-aligned; section dividers; optional badge for new settings
when_to_use: Boolean preferences (email notifications; feature flags; privacy settings); never use for critical irreversible settings

components: Visually separated red-bordered section at page bottom + destructive action buttons + confirm-by-typing dialog
when_to_use: Irreversible account actions (delete account; transfer ownership; revoke all sessions); isolate from routine settings

components: Sidebar or modal checklist with completion percentage; each item links to relevant feature; collapses when 100%
when_to_use: New user activation; feature adoption; empty state escape; keep to 5-7 items max

components: Illustration + explanatory headline + benefit statement + single primary CTA; no secondary actions
when_to_use: First visit to any section with no data yet; guide user to create first item; remove all friction

components: Step indicator (1 of N) + focused single-question form + back/next navigation; skip option if appropriate
when_to_use: Initial account configuration; complex integrations; multi-org setup; use when >5 required fields at first run

components: Sequential spotlight overlays + tooltip with copy + next/skip controls + dim backdrop; dismissible and resumable
when_to_use: Highlighting 3-5 key features on first run; never block core actions; pair with checklist so users can revisit

components: Click cell to activate edit mode; input replaces display value; Enter to save; Escape to cancel; dirty indicator
when_to_use: Bulk editing scenarios; spreadsheet-like workflows; updating single fields without navigating away

components: Row with expand chevron; expanded area shows related detail without navigation; lazy-loaded content
when_to_use: Master-detail relationships where full page navigation is too heavy; order items; nested records

components: Frozen header row + windowed/virtualized body rendering + frozen first column for identity; scroll-position preserved
when_to_use: Very large datasets (1000+ rows); financial or log tables; keeps column context and identity visible while scrolling

components: 2-column layout for related fields (first/last name; city/zip); full-width for standalone fields; clear section headers
when_to_use: Long forms with logical field groupings; reduces perceived length; desktop-primary; never use on mobile (stack to 1 col)

components: Field + helper text below + real-time validation on blur + success/error icon + accessible aria-describedby error message
when_to_use: Any data-entry form; validate on blur not on keystroke; show success only for non-obvious rules like password strength

components: Persistent debounced save + Saved/Saving status indicator + recover-draft prompt on reload; no explicit save button
when_to_use: Long-lived editing (docs; CMS entries; long applications); reduces data-loss anxiety; pair with version history when stakes are high

components: Bell icon with badge; dropdown/drawer with grouped notifications (Today/Earlier); mark-all-read; deep link per item
when_to_use: Any product with async events (comments; mentions; system alerts); required for collaboration products

components: Transient bottom or top-right toast + concise message + optional single action (Undo) + auto-dismiss 4-6s; stack with limit
when_to_use: Confirming a completed action or non-blocking event; always offer Undo for destructive actions instead of a confirm dialog

components: Full-width contextual banner + severity color + icon + message + optional action and dismiss; sits above affected content
when_to_use: Persistent contextual states (trial ending; payment failed; degraded service); never use a toast for state that must stay visible

components: Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K) triggers full-screen overlay; instant search across all entities; recent items default
when_to_use: Power user navigation; products with many entities; developer tools; reduces clicks for frequent actions

components: Search input + debounced typeahead dropdown + grouped results by type + keyboard navigation + recent and trending queries
when_to_use: Content-heavy or catalog products; help users discover and disambiguate; always show empty-query recents to reduce blank-state

components: Results list + left filter facets with counts + sort control + active-filter chips + result count + clear-all
when_to_use: Search over large structured catalogs (e-commerce; jobs; listings); lets users narrow progressively without re-querying

components: Error illustration + what went wrong + specific action to fix it (Retry / Contact support) + error code
when_to_use: API failures; empty search results; permission errors; never show raw error messages to end users

components: Centered illustration + plain-language headline + one primary recovery link (home/back) + secondary support link
when_to_use: Route not found or unrecoverable server error; keep navigation chrome so users are never trapped; log the error server-side

components: Gray shimmer placeholders matching final layout shape + content count; replace progressively as data resolves
when_to_use: Initial load of cards/lists/tables where layout is known; prevents layout shift and perceived slowness vs a bare spinner

components: Centered card (max 400px) + logo + minimal fields + primary submit + secondary links (forgot/signup) + social auth divider
when_to_use: Login/register entry; keep distraction-free; single column; never two-column on mobile; SSO buttons above the fold

components: Provider buttons with brand icon + Continue with X label + OR divider above email form + clear primary vs secondary hierarchy
when_to_use: Consumer and SaaS sign-in; reduce friction; order by likely-used provider; always keep email/password as fallback

components: Segmented single-digit OTP inputs (6 boxes) + auto-advance + paste support + resend timer + use-backup-code link
when_to_use: 2FA verification step; autofill from SMS where supported; paste support is mandatory; clear resend cooldown to avoid lockout

components: 3-4 plan cards in a row + most-popular highlight + feature checklist + price toggle (monthly/annual) + per-tier CTA
when_to_use: Public pricing page or in-app upgrade; anchor with a highlighted recommended tier; show annual savings to nudge commitment

components: Progress bar of used vs quota + numeric usage/limit + upgrade CTA near limit + projected-overage hint
when_to_use: Metered/seat-based products; surface in dashboard and settings; warn before hard limits to convert rather than block silently

components: Table of date + amount + status badge + download-PDF action + payment-method row above + next-charge summary
when_to_use: Billing settings; let users self-serve receipts; show next charge date and active card to reduce billing support tickets

components: Cover/banner + avatar with edit affordance + name/role + key stats row + primary action (Edit/Follow) + tabbed sub-sections
when_to_use: User or org profile landing; establishes identity at a glance; tabs separate overview from activity/settings without navigation

components: Drag-drop or click upload + crop/zoom modal + circular preview + remove option + size/format guidance + optimistic preview
when_to_use: Profile/avatar editing; enforce aspect ratio with the cropper; show guidance before upload to cut failed-validation round-trips

components: Overlapping avatar stack + live online dots + +N overflow chip + tooltip with names; real-time join/leave updates
when_to_use: Multiplayer or shared documents; signal who else is here now; pair with cursors in canvases and live updates in lists

components: Anchored comment threads + reply/resolve + @mention autocomplete + unread markers + jump-to-anchor; collapsible panel
when_to_use: Document/design review and feedback loops; keep comments anchored to content; resolve to declutter without losing history

components: Invite-by-email field + role dropdown per member (Viewer/Editor/Admin) + link-sharing toggle with scope + copy-link + member list
when_to_use: Granting access to a resource; make the default link scope conservative; show effective access clearly to prevent oversharing

components: Inline filter controls + applied-filter chips (removable) + clear-all + result count + saved-views menu; sticky on scroll
when_to_use: List and table views needing quick narrowing; keep chips visible so active filters are never hidden; persist views for repeat tasks

components: Add-condition rows (field + operator + value) + AND/OR group toggle + apply/reset + named saved segments
when_to_use: Power filtering over rich datasets (CRM; analytics; logs); offer simple chips first and reveal the builder for complex queries

components: Left list pane + right detail pane + selection persistence + keyboard up/down navigation; collapses to stacked on mobile
when_to_use: Inbox-style triage (email; tickets; records); keeps context while drilling in; far faster than full-page navigation per item

components: Header with title/status/actions + tabbed or sectioned body (Overview/Activity/Related) + right metadata sidebar + breadcrumb
when_to_use: Single-entity deep view (deal; ticket; user); group related data into tabs; keep primary actions and status pinned in the header

components: Right-side overlay panel + entity summary + quick actions + view-full-page link + close on overlay/Esc; preserves list scroll
when_to_use: Quick peek at a record without leaving the list; ideal for triage and quick edits; escalate to full page for deep work
